_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to implement Zero Trust security in DoD Systems/Software.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility and AI innovation while maintaining protection levels appropriate to the data sensitivity and regulatory context.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.420), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.419).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.434). Shared vocabulary: [ability, security]. DCWF-only terms [dod, implement, software, systems, trust, zero] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, architectures, context, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.887, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Ability to implement Zero Trust security in DoD Systems/Software." and "Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility an" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.431 ≈ STS 0.434 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [ability, security]. DCWF-only: [dod, implement, software, systems, trust, zero]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, architectures, context, data, design].
